description.div: The Qiming Fude Ci is the oldest Earthgod shrine on Penghu.

Located in the center of the old town of Magong, the temple is one of the main temples of Magong and once, the main temple of Dongjia (東甲), where jia (甲) might be understood as a quarter or a cluster of houses, frequently related through a family bond.

geography.address: 台灣澎湖馬公啟明街1鄰1號
880, Taiwan, Penghu County, Magong City, Qimingjie 1, Lin 1, Number 1
